title: Vanity: Crucible
body:
# ❓ About:
  - This is a Vanity pack made purely to add DOOM's Crucible weapon, why? beeg sword haha
#
# ❗️ Important:
  -  This REQUIRES [Vanity: Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanity-core) in order to work, this does nothing on its own.
  -  You are able to acquire the Crucible Designs by trading with Stylist Villagers.
  -  Works on BOTH Fabric & Forge!
#
